title: The Pittsburgh Cafes Creators Won't Stop Filming
subtitle: Coffee, tea, juice, ranked by creator pickup
angle: Pittsburgh's coffee, tea, and juice scene through the lens of TikTok creator coverage. The cafes the city keeps posting about, even when the cafes themselves aren't.
intro:
Pittsburgh's cafe scene has a social media problem, and it cuts both ways. Some of the city's most-filmed spots have no TikTok presence at all. 24 Carrot Juice in Bloomfield pulled 1.45 million creator plays this quarter without posting a single video of its own. Dobrá Tea in Squirrel Hill has ten creators actively documenting the place; the business has no account to receive any of it. The signal is loud. The source isn't broadcasting.

What this list measures is appetite, specifically, what creators reach for when they're deciding what to film. Allegheny Coffee and Tea Exchange in the Strip District ranks first on the strength of both creator volume and a history the city keeps rediscovering, a combination that proved more durable than any single viral moment. Ka-Fair Coffee and Cakery in Morningside ranks third on the back of community posting that outpaces the business's own output by a significant margin.

The pattern running through this quarter's rankings is straightforward: creator attention is not waiting for permission. In Issue 02, we'll track whether any of these businesses close that gap, and what happens to their rankings if they do.

items.name: 24 Carrot Juice
items.descriptor: Eighth In Pittsburgh Cafes, Powered By 1.45 Million Creator Plays On A Platform Where It Has No Account.

items.playbook_top_move: Claim the TikTok audience that already exists. Open a TikTok business account and post one short video per week; 30 creators have already seeded 1.45 million plays with no account to absorb them.

items.name: Allegheny Coffee & Tea Exchange
items.descriptor: First In Pittsburgh Cafes, Carried By Creator Volume And A History The City Keeps Rediscovering.

featured_tiktok.author: pittsburghpg
featured_tiktok.caption:
HBO Max's award-winning medical drama “The Pitt” does a lot of things to ground itself in Pittsburgh.
Its emergency room is based on that of Allegheny General Hospital on the North Side. There are a variety of local references, including on

items.playbook_top_move: Convert creator plays into owned engagement. With 607K TikTok plays across 31 creators this quarter, repost or stitch the top-performing creator videos directly to @alleghenycoffee Reels to redirect that external reach back toward a 1.23% engagement rate that hasn't caught up to posting volume.

items.descriptor: Third In Pittsburgh Cafes, Carried By A City That Posts About It More Than It Posts About Itself.

items.playbook_top_move: Start posting reels before next quarter. Ka-Fair has zero reels in 30 days while 28 creators are building its reputation on TikTok; one weekly reel showing a latte build or cake slice would close the most visible gap in the signal.

items.name: Spot of Coffee
items.descriptor: Second In Pittsburgh Cafes, Riding 278K TikTok Plays It Doesn't Own Yet.
items.playbook_top_move: Add a website to Google Business. Conversion path sits well below the family median of 100; a linked website is the fastest single fix available right now.

items.name: The Butterwood Bake Consortium
items.descriptor: Second In Pittsburgh Cafes, Carried By 20 Outside Voices. The Business's Own Feed Has Gone Silent.

featured_tiktok.author: easternpanhandlefoodie
featured_tiktok.caption:

They’re made of mousse, but somehow taste exactly like the fruit the

items.playbook_top_move: Restart the Instagram feed immediately. 515 days without a post is the clearest suppressor of family rank; one weekly photo of the pastry case closes the gap faster than any other single move.

items.name: Delanie's Coffee Shadyside
items.descriptor: Seventh In Pittsburgh Cafes, Carried By Other People's TikToks And Held Back By Its Own.

featured_tiktok.author: stephr0se8
featured_tiktok.caption:
Some of my fave local coffee shops! Drop some more reccs for me to try 👇🏼
#localcoffeeshop #pittsburgh #coffeetok #supportsmallbusiness #fyp

items.playbook_top_move: Build a TikTok presence from existing footage. Sixteen creators have already filmed 17 videos here; claim the business page and repost the best-performing ones to start building a native presence.

items.name: Dobrá Tea Pittsburgh
items.descriptor: First In Tea Houses, Sixth In Cafes. Ten Creators Posting, Zero TikTok Account.

featured_tiktok.author: alexgdeckerr
featured_tiktok.caption: The Bombay chai is a MUST TRY at Dobrah tea in Squirrel Hill Pittsburgh!! Follow for more Pittsburgh content💓 #pittsburgh #pittsburghpa #pittsburghcheck #pittsburghrestaurants #pittsburghdatenight

items.playbook_top_move: Claim a TikTok presence before momentum fades. Ten creators have posted 11 TikToks this quarter; a business account captures that search traffic and gives the Bombay chai its own stage.

items.name: Margaux
items.descriptor: Third In Pittsburgh Cafes, Carried By A Room Creators Love. The Business Hasn't Matched Their Energy On TikTok.

featured_tiktok.author: deluludayss
featured_tiktok.caption: aesthetic places to visit in pittsburgh | part 1 #pittsburgh #pgh #aestheticplaces #coffeeaesthetic #aestheticvibes @fieldday.life @margauxpgh

items.playbook_top_move: Put a phone number on Google. Margaux's Google listing has no phone number, the only business in the family missing one, a direct hit to conversion path.
